title: Pan-seared Thai Cod Curry
description: Quick-fix Thai curry with pan-seared cod, featuring low-sodium-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the cod fillets with salt and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, until opaque and cooked through.
Transfer the cooked cod to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 2 tbsp of coconut oil and sauté the curry paste for 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and stir to combine with the curry paste.
Add the fish sauce, brown sugar, and lemon juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly thickened.
Stir in the chopped green chilies and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the curry sauce over the cooked cod and garnish with chopped cilantro.
